nasb.text: And Azariah slept with his fathers, and they buried him with his fathers in the city of David, and Jotham his son became king in his place.

esv.text: And Azariah slept with his fathers, and they buried him with his fathers in the city of David, and Jotham his son reigned in his place.

cnv.text: 亞撒利雅和他的祖先一同長眠，葬在大衛的城，和他的祖先在一起。他的兒子約坦接續他作王。

ccb.text: 亚撒利雅与祖先同眠后，葬在大卫城他的祖坟里。他儿子约坦继位。
